title: Required actions flow to work with items and subitems

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, please…we need automation that let us set change some columns actions as required.
Example: To change Status successfully, required actions are: Set Date in column Date, Fill Text Column X, Fill Stars column.
That mean, when user want to change the Status column, it will show the mentioned 3 columns one by one to be changed, then Status changed successfully, if user do not complete the actions required, the Status just will can not to be changed
